summary: Established Integration-First TDD testing guidelines covering approach (red→green→refactor, integration tests first, deterministic tests, tests as design tool), test design (behavioral names, edge cases, security negative tests, purpose-built fixtures), tooling (PHPUnit integration suites, JS runners with DOM/WordPress mocks, WP_UnitTestCase harness), and workflow safeguards (no merging failing tests, fast feedback via parallelization, fixing bugs surfaced by tests)
